beIN SPORTS 4.title: Metz vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Metz have won 68% of their matches against Paris FC in all competitions, their highest ratio against any opponent they have faced at least 15 times. There has never been a draw in seven Ligue 1 meetings between the two teams, with these encounters producing an average of four goals per game. beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lens vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lens have won seven of their last nine Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse, after failing to win any of their previous six. Lens have lost three of their last six home Ligue 1 matches against Toulouse, as many as they had in their previous 26 such games.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lorient vs Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lorient vs Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Olympique de Marseille have beaten Lorient more than any other side in Ligue 1, boasting a 60% win rate against them, which is also more than any other team. Lorient are currently on a 13-game winless run against Olympique de Marseille, their longest current drought against a top-flight side. Lorient have won just 12% of their home games against Olympique de Marseille in Ligue 1, their lowest win rate against a team they have hosted more than ten times in the top-flight.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Angers vs Havre AC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Angers vs Havre AC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Angers have gone 10 consecutive Ligue 1 matches without scoring more than one goal against Le Havre, only managing to score more than once in the first of 11 meetings between the two sides in the division, on 1 October 1959. Angers have not lost any of their five home Ligue 1 matches against Le Havre, keeping three clean sheets in these encounters.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lille vs Nice - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 30
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lille OSC have won just one of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against OGC Nice, a 2-1 victory at Pierre-Mauroy on 17 January 2025. Lille OSC currently have the best winning run  and unbeaten run  in Ligue 1. Lille OSC have even won their last two matches by more than two goals, a first since October 2020, but they have not done better since December 2009.

beIN SPORTS 6.original_title: Elche vs Atletico Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 6.title: Elche vs Atletico Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 6.desc: Elche have not lost any of their last two LaLiga matches against Atlético de Madrid, after losing the previous 11, and could go three or more without defeat against them in the competition for the first time since February 1969. Atlético de Madrid lost on their last visit to Elche in LaLiga, 1-0 in May 2023, after winning each of their previous five, while the last time they lost two consecutive away games against them in the competition was in September 1975.

beIN SPORTS 6.original_title: Mallorca vs Valencia - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 6.title: Mallorca vs Valencia - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 6.desc: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca are unbeaten in their last three home games against Valencia CF in LaLiga, while they have never gone four consecutive home matches without defeat against them in the competition's history. Valencia CF are unbeaten in their last two meetings with Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, and have not gone longer without defeat against them in the competition since March 2012.

beIN SPORTS 6.title: Elche vs Atletico Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 6.desc: Elche have not lost any of their last two LaLiga matches against Atlético de Madrid, after losing the previous 11, and could go three or more without defeat against them in the competition for the first time since February 1969. Atlético de Madrid lost on their last visit to Elche in LaLiga, 1-0 in May 2023, after winning each of their previous five, while the last time they lost two consecutive away games against them in the competition was in September 1975.
